Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the PCAP file
Correction: The system shall accept PCAP files in the standard libpcap format.

Label: Section 2.1.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported operating systems for the program
Correction: The program shall support Windows 10, macOS 10.15, and Ubuntu 20.04 or later.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support PCAP files up to 2GB in size.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the normalization methods
Correction: The default normalization method shall be set to None.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for saving configurations
Correction: Configurations shall be saved in JSON format.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting graphs as images
Correction: Graphs shall be exported as PNG images.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of hidden layers for the autoencoder
Correction: The autoencoder shall support up to 10 hidden layers.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of nodes per hidden layer for the autoencoder
Correction: Each hidden layer in the autoencoder shall support up to 1024 nodes.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported loss functions for the autoencoder
Correction: The autoencoder shall support MSE and MAE as loss functions.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported optimizers for the autoencoder
Correction: The autoencoder shall support Adam, SGD, and RMSprop as optimizers.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the performance analysis graphs
Correction: Performance analysis graphs shall be displayed as line charts.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the session save files
Correction: Session save files shall be in JSON format.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the exported PDF report
Correction: The PDF report shall include configurations, results, and performance graphs in a structured format.

Label: Section 2.3.1
Issue: Does not specify the response time for showing results from preprocessing
Correction: The system shall display results from preprocessing within 1 second.

Label: Section 2.3.1
Issue: Does not specify the security measures to prevent data leaks
Correction: The system shall use HTTPS for all data transmissions and encrypt all stored data.

Label: Section 2.3.1
Issue: Does not specify the documentation format
Correction: The implementation and design documentation shall be provided in Markdown format.
